data.title: Mercari, Inc. Reports Solid Growth in Latest Earnings
data.description:
Mercari, Inc. ( (MCARY) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Mercari, Inc. presented to its investors.

Mercari, Inc. is a Japanese e-commerce company primarily operating in the marketplace and fintech sectors, known for its innovative use of AI and large-scale C2C transactions.

In its latest earnings report for the nine months ending March 31, 2025, Mercari, Inc. showcased a steady growth trajectory with a 2.3% increase in revenue compared to the previous year, reaching ¥144,067 million. The company’s operating profit saw a significant rise of 58.9%, amounting to ¥20,336 million, while profit attributable to owners of the parent increased by 34.0% to ¥11,732 million.

Key financial highlights include a robust performance in the Japan Region, where revenue rose by 8.0% year-on-year to ¥111,858 million, driven by strategic product initiatives and effective marketing. The fintech domain also contributed positively with a core operating profit of ¥3.4 billion, supported by a high credit collection rate of 99.0%. In the US, Mercari’s segment loss improved significantly, reflecting optimized marketing expenses and cost reductions.

Looking ahead, Mercari, Inc. maintains a positive outlook, expecting consolidated revenue for the fiscal year ending June 30, 2025, to be between ¥200,000 million and ¥210,000 million, with core operating profit projected to rise by up to 32.5%. The company remains focused on achieving top-line growth and enhancing profitability through strategic initiatives and market expansion.

data.title: Micro-X Ltd. Director Increases Stake Through Share Placement
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Micro-X Ltd. ( (AU:MX1) ).

Micro-X Ltd. announced a change in the director’s interest, with Patrick O’Brien acquiring 1,428,571 ordinary shares, increasing his total holdings to 10,287,591 shares. This acquisition was made through a company placement approved by shareholders, reflecting confidence in the company’s strategic direction and potential growth, which could impact stakeholders positively by enhancing market confidence.

More about Micro-X Ltd.

Micro-X Ltd. operates in the technology and medical imaging industry, focusing on the development and commercialization of innovative X-ray imaging products. The company aims to revolutionize the medical imaging market with its lightweight, portable X-ray systems, targeting healthcare facilities and other sectors requiring advanced imaging solutions.

data.title: Osteopore Ltd. Issues 11.6 Million Performance Rights
data.description:
An announcement from Osteopore Ltd. ( (AU:OSX) ) is now available.

Osteopore Ltd. has announced the issuance of 11,625,000 performance rights under an employee incentive scheme. These securities are unquoted and subject to transfer restrictions until the end of the restriction period. This move is likely aimed at aligning employee interests with company performance, potentially enhancing motivation and retention within the workforce.

More about Osteopore Ltd.

Osteopore Ltd. operates in the medical technology industry, specializing in the development and production of bioresorbable implants for bone regeneration. Their products are primarily used in surgical procedures to aid in the natural healing process of bone defects.

data.description:

Galilee Energy Limited held a General Meeting on May 8, 2025, where shareholders approved several resolutions, including the issuance of shares to key associates and the ratification of previously issued shares under a placement. These approvals are likely to enhance the company’s capital structure and support its strategic initiatives in the energy sector. The resolutions passed with significant majorities, indicating strong shareholder support for the company’s direction and potential growth opportunities.

The company primarily engages in the extraction and commercialization of natural gas resources, aiming to contribute to the energy market with sustainable and efficient energy solutions.

data.title: Investigator Resources Affirms Stability in Mineral Resource Estimates
data.description:
Investigator Resources Ltd ( (AU:IVR) ) has provided an update.

Investigator Resources Limited has provided an update on its exploration activities, emphasizing the stability of its mineral resource estimates for the Paris Silver Project and the Molyhil Tungsten/Molybdenum Project. The company confirms that there have been no material changes to the assumptions and parameters underpinning these projects, reinforcing its strategic positioning in the mining sector and maintaining investor confidence in its ongoing operations.

More about Investigator Resources Ltd

Investigator Resources Limited is an Australian company focused on the exploration and development of silver and other mineral resources. The company is primarily engaged in projects such as the Paris Silver Project and the Molyhil Tungsten/Molybdenum Project, positioning itself as a significant player in the mining industry with a focus on silver and tungsten/molybdenum resources.

data.title: Star Copper Corp. Announces Spin-Out of Okeover Project
data.description:
Alpha Copper Corp ( (TSE:STCU) ) has issued an update.

Star Copper Corp. has announced the effective date for the spin-out of its Okeover copper-molybdenum project, which will occur on May 9, 2025. Shareholders will receive new shares of Star Copper and Spinco Shares in Alpha Copper Corp. as part of the arrangement. This strategic move is expected to streamline Star Copper’s operations and potentially enhance its market positioning by focusing on its core copper-gold assets in British Columbia.

More about Alpha Copper Corp

Star Copper Corp. is a company focused on contributing to the green economy by developing copper resource assets in stable jurisdictions. It holds interests in several projects in British Columbia, including the Indata copper-gold project, the Star copper-gold porphyry project, and the Quesnel project. The company also has a 100% interest in the Okeover Copper-Molybdenum project.

Average Trading Volume: 25,287

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$12.34M

data.title: Makita Corporation Reports Significant Financial Variations for FY 2025
data.description:
Makita Corporation ( (JP:6586) ) has provided an announcement.

Makita Corporation reported significant differences in its non-consolidated financial results for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025, compared to the previous year. The company experienced a notable increase in net sales driven by higher overseas orders, resulting in a 35.4% rise. However, ordinary income and net income saw substantial declines due to decreased dividend income and other factors, impacting the overall financial performance.

More about Makita Corporation

Makita Corporation operates in the power tools industry, focusing on manufacturing and selling a wide range of power tools, outdoor power equipment, and accessories. The company is known for its innovative products catering to both professional and consumer markets globally.
